870.candidate_text:
('clearing a buffer', () => {
    const buffer = new CircularBuffer<string>(2)
    buffer.write('1')
    buffer.write('2')
    buffer.clear()
    expect(() => buffer.read()).toThrow(BufferEmptyError)
    buffer.write('3')
    buffer.write('4')
    expect(buffer.read()).toBe('3')
    expect(buffer.read()).toBe('4')
  })

2516.candidate_text:
('alternate force write and read into full buffer', () => {
    const buffer = new CircularBuffer<string>(5)
    buffer.write('1')
    buffer.write('2')
    buffer.write('3')
    buffer.read()
    buffer.read()
    buffer.write('4')
    buffer.read()
    buffer.write('5')
    buffer.write('6')
    buffer.write('7')
    buffer.write('8')
    buffer.forceWrite('A')
    buffer.forceWrite('B')
    expect(buffer.read()).toBe('6')
    expect(buffer.read()).toBe('7')
    expect(buffer.read()).toBe('8')
    expect(buffer.read()).toBe('A')
    expect(buffer.read()).toBe('B')
    expect(() => buffer.read()).toThrow(BufferEmptyError)
  })
